sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67141" key="metewristiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετεωρ-ιστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n67141.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">disturbing</tr_> to the mind, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(1).168</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
